fields.summary: Provides a mutable builder for constructing <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> objects incrementally.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKPathBuilder` lets you build a path step-by-step by adding move, line, curve, arc, and shape operations, then produce an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPath> with <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Snapshot> (non-destructive copy) or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Detach> (transfers ownership, resetting the builder).

This type wraps a native Skia resource and implements `IDisposable`. Always dispose of it when done, either with a `using` statement or by calling `Dispose()` directly.

## Examples

```csharp
using var builder = new SKPathBuilder();
builder.MoveTo(0, 0);
builder.LineTo(100, 0);
builder.LineTo(100, 100);
builder.Close();
using var path = builder.Snapshot();
canvas.DrawPath(path, paint);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder ();

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class, pre-populated with a copy of the specified path.

params.path: The path whose contents are copied into the new builder.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder (SkiaSharp.SKPath path);

fields.summary: Adds an arc that fits inside the specified oval, beginning at <paramref name="startAngle" /> and sweeping <paramref name="sweepAngle" /> degrees.

params.oval: The bounding oval that contains the arc.
params.startAngle: The starting angle of the arc, in degrees.
params.sweepAngle: The sweep angle of the arc, in degrees.

entries.signature: public void AddArc (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle);

fields.summary: Adds a complete circle contour to the path.

params.x: The x-coordinate of the circle center.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the circle center.
params.dir: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the contour.

entries.signature: public void AddCircle (float x, float y, float radius, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Adds a complete oval contour to the path.

params.rect: The bounding rectangle of the oval.
params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the contour.

entries.signature: public void AddOval (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends all contours from another path to this builder.

params.other: The path whose contours are appended.
params.mode: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is added.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends all contours from another path to this builder, transformed by the specified matrix.

params.other: The path whose contours are appended.
params.matrix: The transformation matrix applied to the path before appending.
params.mode: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is added.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, in SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends all contours from another path to this builder, offset by the specified translation.

params.other: The path whose contours are appended.
params.dx: The x offset applied to the path before appending.
params.dy: The y offset applied to the path before appending.
params.mode: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is added.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, float dx, float dy, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Adds a polygon contour to the path from the specified array of points.

params.points: The array of points forming the polygon.
params.close: <see langword="true" /> to close the polygon contour; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (SkiaSharp.SKPoint[] points, bool close = true);

fields.summary: Adds a polygon contour to the path from the specified span of points.

params.points: The span of points forming the polygon.
params.close: <see langword="true" /> to close the polygon contour; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKPoint> points, bool close = true);

fields.summary: Adds a closed rectangle contour to the path.

params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction.

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Adds a closed rectangle contour to the path, starting at the specified corner.

params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction.
params.startIndex: The zero-based index of the corner at which to start the contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

fields.summary: Adds a closed rounded-rectangle contour to the path.

params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Adds a closed rounded-rectangle contour to the path, starting at the specified corner.

params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction.
params.startIndex: The zero-based index of the corner at which to start the contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

fields.summary: Adds a closed rounded-rectangle contour to the path using individual x and y radii.

params.rx: The x-axis radius of the rounded corners.
params.ry: The y-axis radius of the rounded corners.
params.dir: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, float rx, float ry, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends an arc that connects the current point to <paramref name="point1" />, then curves to <paramref name="point2" />, with the specified radius.

params.point1: The tangent point after the current point.
params.point2: The tangent point at the end of the arc.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2, float radius);

fields.summary: Appends an arc that fits inside the specified oval, beginning at <paramref name="startAngle" /> and sweeping <paramref name="sweepAngle" /> degrees.

params.oval: The bounding oval that contains the arc.
params.startAngle: The starting angle of the arc, in degrees.
params.sweepAngle: The sweep angle of the arc, in degrees.
params.forceMoveTo: <see langword="true" /> to begin a new contour with a move-to before the arc; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle, bool forceMoveTo);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style arc to the path.

params.r: The radii of the ellipse (x and y).
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse x-axis, in degrees.
params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values specifying whether to draw the larger arc.
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values specifying the arc direction.
params.xy: The end point of the arc.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

fields.summary: Appends a tangent arc that connects the current point to (<paramref name="x2" />, <paramref name="y2" />) via (<paramref name="x1" />, <paramref name="y1" />), with the specified radius.

params.x1: The x-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.x2: The x-coordinate of the second tangent point.
params.y2: The y-coordinate of the second tangent point.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2, float radius);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style arc to the path using scalar radii and coordinates.

params.rx: The x-axis radius of the ellipse.
params.ry: The y-axis radius of the ellipse.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse x-axis, in degrees.
params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values specifying whether to draw the larger arc.
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values specifying the arc direction.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

fields.summary: Closes the current contour by adding a line segment from the current point to the start of the contour.

entries.signature: public void Close ();

fields.summary: Appends a conic curve to the path.

params.point0: The control point of the conic.
params.point1: The end point of the conic.
params.w: The weight of the conic, which controls the curvature.

entries.signature: public void ConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a conic curve to the path using scalar coordinates.

params.x0: The x-coordinate of the control point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the control point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the end point.
params.w: The weight of the conic, which controls the curvature.

entries.signature: public void ConicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bezier curve to the path.

params.point2: The end point of the curve.

entries.signature: public void CubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bezier curve to the path using scalar coordinates.

params.x0: The x-coordinate of the first control point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the first control point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the second control point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the second control point.
params.x2: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.y2: The y-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public void CubicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2);

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> containing the path built so far. The builder is reset after this call.
fields.summary: Produces a new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> from the current builder state and resets the builder.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Detach ();

fields.summary: Called by the <see cref="M:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Dispose" /> and <see cref="M:System.Object.Finalize" /> methods to release the managed and unmanaged resources used by the current instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class.

params.disposing: <see langword="true" /> to release both managed and unmanaged resources; <see langword="false" /> to release only unmanaged resources.

entries.signature: protected override void Dispose (bool disposing);

fields.summary: Releases the native resources used by this path builder.

entries.signature: protected override void DisposeNative ();

fields.summary: Gets or sets the fill type used when converting this builder to a path.
fields.value: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the interior of the path is determined.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPathFillType FillType { get; set; }

fields.summary: Appends a line segment from the current point to the specified point.

params.point: The end point of the line segment.

entries.signature: public void LineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Appends a line segment from the current point to the specified coordinates.

params.x: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public void LineTo (float x, float y);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at the specified point.

params.point: The starting point of the new contour.

entries.signature: public void MoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at the specified coordinates.

params.x: The x-coordinate of the starting point.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the starting point.

entries.signature: public void MoveTo (float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bezier curve to the path.

params.point0: The control point of the curve.
params.point1: The end point of the curve.

entries.signature: public void QuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bezier curve to the path using scalar coordinates.

params.x0: The x-coordinate of the control point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the control point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public void QuadTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style arc to the path, with the end point specified relative to the current point.

params.r: The radii of the ellipse (x and y).
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse x-axis, in degrees.
params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values specifying whether to draw the larger arc.
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values specifying the arc direction.
params.xy: The end point offset relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style arc to the path using scalar radii, with the end point specified relative to the current point.

params.rx: The x-axis radius of the ellipse.
params.ry: The y-axis radius of the ellipse.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse x-axis, in degrees.
params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values specifying whether to draw the larger arc.
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values specifying the arc direction.
params.x: The x offset of the end point relative to the current point.
params.y: The y offset of the end point relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends a relative conic curve to the path, with points specified as offsets from the current point.

params.point0: The offset of the control point from the current point.
params.point1: The offset of the end point from the current point.
params.w: The weight of the conic, which controls the curvature.

entries.signature: public void RConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a relative conic curve to the path using scalar offsets from the current point.

params.dx0: The x offset of the control point.
params.dy0: The y offset of the control point.
params.dx1: The x offset of the end point.
params.dy1: The y offset of the end point.
params.w: The weight of the conic, which controls the curvature.

entries.signature: public void RConicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a relative cubic Bezier curve to the path, with points specified as offsets from the current point.

params.point0: The offset of the first control point.
params.point1: The offset of the second control point.
params.point2: The offset of the end point.

entries.signature: public void RCubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);

fields.summary: Appends a relative cubic Bezier curve to the path using scalar offsets from the current point.

params.dx0: The x offset of the first control point.
params.dy0: The y offset of the first control point.
params.dx1: The x offset of the second control point.
params.dy1: The y offset of the second control point.
params.dx2: The x offset of the end point.
params.dy2: The y offset of the end point.

entries.signature: public void RCubicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float dx2, float dy2);

fields.summary: Resets the builder to its empty state, removing all previously added path data.

entries.signature: public void Reset ();

fields.summary: Appends all contours from another path to this builder in reverse order.

params.other: The path whose contours are appended in reverse.

entries.signature: public void ReverseAddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other);

fields.summary: Appends a relative line segment from the current point, offset by the specified point.

params.point: The offset from the current point to the end of the line segment.

entries.signature: public void RLineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Appends a relative line segment from the current point using scalar offsets.

params.dx: The x offset from the current point.
params.dy: The y offset from the current point.

entries.signature: public void RLineTo (float dx, float dy);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at a point offset from the current point by the specified point.

params.point: The offset from the current point to the new contour start.

entries.signature: public void RMoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at a point offset from the current point using scalar offsets.

params.dx: The x offset from the current point.
params.dy: The y offset from the current point.

entries.signature: public void RMoveTo (float dx, float dy);

fields.summary: Appends a relative quadratic Bezier curve to the path, with points specified as offsets from the current point.

params.point0: The offset of the control point from the current point.
params.point1: The offset of the end point from the current point.

entries.signature: public void RQuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);

fields.summary: Appends a relative quadratic Bezier curve to the path using scalar offsets from the current point.

params.dx0: The x offset of the control point.
params.dy0: The y offset of the control point.
params.dx1: The x offset of the end point.
params.dy1: The y offset of the end point.

entries.signature: public void RQuadTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1);

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> containing the current path data. The builder retains its state after this call.
fields.summary: Produces a new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> snapshot of the current builder state without resetting the builder.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Snapshot ();
